name: notion-deploy-integration
description: Deploy Node.js applications that use the Notion API to production on Vercel, Railway, or Fly.io. Use when deploying Notion-powered backends, setting up NOTION_TOKEN in production secrets, configuring serverless singleton patterns, or adding health checks that verify Notion connectivity. Trigger: "deploy notion app", "notion production", "notion vercel deploy", "notion railway", "notion fly.io".
